title: Liquidation appears to succeed without a real shortfall
reason: Merged into F-001. The lack of a genuine shortfall is part of the same same-market self-liquidation exploit path, not a distinct issue.

title: Borrowers can liquidate their own positions and internalize liquidation incentives
reason: Merged into F-001. Self-liquidation is one required condition of the broader liquidation-accounting flaw rather than a separate reportable bug on this record.
